resources.string: RootlessZachDSP
Tap to open RootlessZachDSP
User action is required to launch RootlessZachDSP
Tap to grant capture permission and enable RootlessZachDSP audio processing
RootlessZachDSP stopped due to audio session control loss. Please disable other audio effect apps.
Audio processing stopped. Another app is interfering with RootlessZachDSP.
Please disable all other apps that provide global audio effects before re-enabling RootlessZachDSP.
RootlessZachDSP stopped due to an incompatible media app. Please check the notification to resolve this problem.
Audio processing stopped. Another app is interfering with RootlessZachDSP.
RootlessZachDSP has been stopped because the audio capture permission was revoked.
Already use an earlier RootlessZachDSP or RootlessJamesDSP build? Import its DSP backup now, or open Settings before completing setup.
Import existing DSP backup
Required to receive important status updates and information about RootlessZachDSP processing.
RootlessZachDSP is set up!
Hardware-accelerated audio playback may sometimes cause duplicated audio or stop RootlessZachDSP. Add the affected media app to the excluded-apps list to prevent RootlessZachDSP from rerouting it.

When enhanced processing is enabled, you can selectively exclude apps from RootlessZachDSP. Open the three-dot menu and select Excluded apps to access this feature.\n\nWith legacy mode disabled, each compatible app receives its own processing session for finer control. Enhanced processing proactively detects media sessions when a media app does not publish the expected Android session events.
RootlessZachDSP is not active
Cannot run the script because RootlessZachDSP is disabled. Turn on RootlessZachDSP to execute scripts.
Do you want to reset the current RootlessZachDSP preset to its default values?
Visit the RootlessZachDSP project page
Check for project updates
